query: INSERT INTO cards (cardId, name, cardType, rarity, alignment, element, dimension, characterClass, species, faction, cost, power, health, abilityText, flavorText, imageUrl, loredexEntryId, era, season, disciplines, keywords, unlockMethod, isActive) VALUES ('char-overseer-90012', 'The Overseer', 'character', 'legendary', 'order', 'earth', 'reality', 'soldier', 'human', 'Panopticon', 6, 5, 7, 'Total Surveillance: When The Overseer enters play, look at all face-down cards your opponent controls. Lockdown Protocol: Once per turn, prevent a character from attacking or using abilities.', '"Every breath you take in my facility is a privilege I can revoke."', 'https://d2xsxph8kpxj0f.cloudfront.net/310419663032080159/2quXz2C2n5hMfqc8hNVW3h/the_overseer-E4BoHQfCGdnL9YnQPMbGZN.png', 'entity_101', 'Epoch Zero', 'Season 1', '["Surveillance", "Incarceration", "Interrogation"]', '["prison", "control", "lockdown", "reveal"]', 'story', 1);
